# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

apiVersion: '2021-04-01'
type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
name: mySqlServer
location: eastus
properties:
  administratorLogin: sqladminuser
  administratorLoginPassword: P@ssw0rd123!

resources:
  - type: databases
    name: myDatabase
    location: eastus
    properties:
      edition: Basic
      requestedServiceObjective: Basic
      maxSizeBytes: 2147483648  # 2 GB for Basic tier

parameters:
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: mySqlServer
  databaseName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: myDatabase
  adminLogin:
    type: string
    defaultValue: sqladminuser
  adminPassword:
    type: securestring
    defaultValue: P@ssw0rd123!

outputs:
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
  databaseName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('databaseName')]"
